nasb.text: And he answered and said to him, ‘Let it alone, sir, for this year too, until I dig around it and put in fertilizer;

esv.text: And he answered him, ‘Sir, let it alone this year also, until I dig around it and put on manure.

cnv.text: 管園的說：‘主人，今年且留著它，等我把周圍的泥土挖鬆，加上肥料；

ccb.text: “园丁请求说，‘主人，再留它一年吧！让我在它四周松土、施肥，

csbs.text: “但是园丁回答，对他说：‘主人，今年再留着它吧。等我在它周围挖掘，施些粪肥，
